auth.label: API Key
auth.description: ZeroBounce API key sent with the api_key query parameter. Create your account at https://www.zerobounce.net/api/ and manage keys from your account settings.

actions.name: create_filter_rule
actions.description: Create or update one ZeroBounce custom allow/block filter rule.

rule.description: Whether the filter rule should allow or block matching addresses.

target.description: The filter scope used by ZeroBounce for this rule.

value.description: The filter value such as an email address, domain, MX record, or TLD.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating or updating a custom ZeroBounce filter rule.

message.description: The confirmation message returned by ZeroBounce.

outputSchema.description: The ZeroBounce custom filter rule mutation response.

actions.name: get_activity_data
actions.description: Get ZeroBounce email activity data for one email address.

email.description: The email address used for this ZeroBounce request.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading email activity data.

found.description: Whether ZeroBounce found activity data for the email address.

active_in_days.description: The last activity bucket returned by ZeroBounce when available.

actions.name: get_api_usage
actions.description: Get ZeroBounce API usage metrics for a date range.

start_date.description: The inclusive usage period start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

end_date.description: The inclusive usage period end date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading ZeroBounce API usage metrics.

total.description: The total number of API validations in the time range.

start_date.description: The inclusive usage period start date returned by ZeroBounce.

end_date.description: The inclusive usage period end date returned by ZeroBounce.

status_valid.description: The number of validations with status_valid.

status_invalid.description: The number of validations with status_invalid.

status_catch_all.description: The number of validations with status_catch_all.

status_do_not_mail.description: The number of validations with status_do_not_mail.

status_spamtrap.description: The number of validations with status_spamtrap.

status_unknown.description: The number of validations with status_unknown.

sub_status_toxic.description: The number of validations with sub_status_toxic.

sub_status_disposable.description: The number of validations with sub_status_disposable.

sub_status_role_based.description: The number of validations with sub_status_role_based.

sub_status_possible_trap.description: The number of validations with sub_status_possible_trap.

sub_status_global_suppression.description: The number of validations with sub_status_global_suppression.

sub_status_timeout_exceeded.description: The number of validations with sub_status_timeout_exceeded.

sub_status_mail_server_temporary_error.description: The number of validations with sub_status_mail_server_temporary_error.

sub_status_mail_server_did_not_respond.description: The number of validations with sub_status_mail_server_did_not_respond.

sub_status_greylisted.description: The number of validations with sub_status_greylisted.

sub_status_antispam_system.description: The number of validations with sub_status_antispam_system.

sub_status_does_not_accept_mail.description: The number of validations with sub_status_does_not_accept_mail.

sub_status_exception_occurred.description: The number of validations with sub_status_exception_occurred.

sub_status_failed_syntax_check.description: The number of validations with sub_status_failed_syntax_check.

sub_status_mailbox_not_found.description: The number of validations with sub_status_mailbox_not_found.

sub_status_unroutable_ip_address.description: The number of validations with sub_status_unroutable_ip_address.

sub_status_possible_typo.description: The number of validations with sub_status_possible_typo.

sub_status_no_dns_entries.description: The number of validations with sub_status_no_dns_entries.

sub_status_role_based_catch_all.description: The number of validations with sub_status_role_based_catch_all.

sub_status_mailbox_quota_exceeded.description: The number of validations with sub_status_mailbox_quota_exceeded.

sub_status_forcible_disconnect.description: The number of validations with sub_status_forcible_disconnect.

sub_status_failed_smtp_connection.description: The number of validations with sub_status_failed_smtp_connection.

sub_status_leading_period_removed.description: The number of validations with sub_status_leading_period_removed.

sub_status_alias_address.description: The number of validations with sub_status_alias_address.

sub_status_mx_forward.description: The number of validations with sub_status_mx_forward.

sub_status_alternate.description: The number of validations with sub_status_alternate.

sub_status_blocked.description: The number of validations with sub_status_blocked.

sub_status_allowed.description: The number of validations with sub_status_allowed.

outputSchema.description: The ZeroBounce API usage metrics response.

actions.name: get_credit_balance
actions.description: Get the current ZeroBounce credit balance.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input.

actions.name: list_filter_rules
actions.description: List the current ZeroBounce custom allow/block filter rules.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input.

rule.description: Whether the filter rule should allow or block matching addresses.

target.description: The filter scope used by ZeroBounce for this rule.

value.description: The filter value returned by ZeroBounce.

items.description: One ZeroBounce custom filter rule entry.

filters.description: The custom allow/block rules currently configured in ZeroBounce.

outputSchema.description: The ZeroBounce list filter rules response.

actions.name: validate_email
actions.description: Validate a single email address with ZeroBounce in real time.

email.description: The raw email address to validate with ZeroBounce.

ip_address.description: The optional client IP address used for geo enrichment.

credits_info.description: Whether ZeroBounce should include remaining credits information in the response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for validating a single email address.

address.description: The validated email address returned by ZeroBounce.

status.description: The top-level validation status returned by ZeroBounce.

free_email.description: Whether the email belongs to a free email provider.

mx_found.description: Whether ZeroBounce found MX records for the domain.

sub_status.description: The more specific ZeroBounce validation sub-status.

mx_record.description: The MX record returned by ZeroBounce.

anyOf.description: The correction suggestion returned by ZeroBounce, if any.

domain.description: The domain portion of the validated email address.

account.description: The local-part portion of the validated email address.

active_in_days.description: The last activity bucket returned by ZeroBounce when available.

processed_at.description: The ZeroBounce processing timestamp, if any.

anyOf.description: The smtp provider value inferred by ZeroBounce, or null when unavailable.
The firstname value inferred by ZeroBounce, or null when unavailable.
The lastname value inferred by ZeroBounce, or null when unavailable.
The gender value inferred by ZeroBounce, or null when unavailable.
The country value inferred by ZeroBounce, or null when unavailable.
The region value inferred by ZeroBounce, or null when unavailable.
The city value inferred by ZeroBounce, or null when unavailable.
The zipcode value inferred by ZeroBounce, or null when unavailable.
The domain age days value inferred by ZeroBounce, or null when unavailable.

outputSchema.description: The ZeroBounce single email validation response.
